hero.title: Franchise recruitment is broken. We built something better.
hero.subtitle: Traditional brokers and portals were built to shift volume, not find the right fit. We're hospitality operators who've built, scaled and recruited for real brands - that inside knowledge is now entirely in your corner, and it won't cost you a penny.
hero.description: Traditional brokers and portals were built to shift volume, not find the right fit. We're hospitality operators who've built, scaled and recruited for real brands - that inside knowledge is now entirely in your corner, and it won't cost you a penny.

stats.yearsDesc: Years inside hospitality, building, operating and scaling real brands
stats.freeDesc: Always. No hidden fees, no commission from your side, ever
stats.worthDesc: We've sat at the franchisor's recruitment table. Now we sit at yours

matchPreview.title: Your matches are ready. Book a free call to see the full picture.
matchPreview.description: We score every brand in our network against your profile: budget, location, lifestyle and ambition. The ones at the top aren't just affordable. They're genuinely right for you.

whyChoose.title: We know what franchisors are actually looking for. That's your advantage.
whyChoose.text1: Traditional franchise brokers work for the brand, not for you. Portals get paid when you click. Neither has a real incentive to find you the right fit. We're the only franchisee-first matching service in the UK, built by people who've sat on the other side of the recruitment table and know what franchisors are actually looking for.
whyChoose.text2: That means we know the non-negotiables, the red flags, and where franchisors have room to move. We share all of it with you, before you ever sit down with a brand.

benefits.title: Completely Free Consultation
benefits.description: No hidden fees, no pressure. Just honest, expert guidance to help you make the right decision.

benefits.title: Personalised Matching
benefits.description: We don't just throw options at you. We assess your goals, budget, and lifestyle to find franchises that truly fit.

benefits.title: Experienced Advisors
benefits.description: With over 30 years in hospitality and franchising between us, we've seen it all and we're here to share that knowledge with you.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From first conversation to signing day - here's what working with us actually looks like.

steps.title: Tell us what you're really looking for
steps.description: Not just budget and postcode. We want to understand how you want to spend your days, what success looks like in year three, and what you're not willing to compromise on. Takes about two minutes.

steps.title: We find your matches, from brands worth joining
steps.description: Our network is curated, not a directory. Every brand we work with has been assessed by us first. We score them against your profile and surface the ones that are genuinely right, not just available.

steps.title: We prep you. Properly.
steps.description: Before any introduction, we walk you through the unit economics, pressure-test your thinking, and make sure you go in with your eyes fully open. No surprises. No rose-tinted pitch decks.

steps.title: We're with you through to signing
steps.description: What to ask. What to push back on. What the franchisor is really looking for. We stay in your corner from first call to franchise award and beyond.

finalCTA.title: Ready to find your match?
finalCTA.description: It takes about two minutes and costs nothing. Tell us what you're looking for and we'll do the rest.
